policy.name: Fixable Severity at least Important
policy.description: Alert on deployments with fixable vulnerabilities with a Severity Rating at least Important
policy.rationale: Known vulnerabilities make it easier for adversaries to exploit your application. You can fix these high-severity vulnerabilities by updating to a newer version of the affected component(s).
policy.remediation: Use your package manager to update to a fixed version in future builds or speak with your security team to mitigate the vulnerabilities.

violations.message: Fixable CVE-2026-22184 (CVSS 9.8) (severity Critical) found in component 'zlib' (version 1.3.1-r2) in container 'redis', resolved by version 1.3.2-r0
